name: CONTRACT-BUG-33
title: Multiple duplicate CONTRACT-BUG-12/13/14/15 filings due to file-item.py retry loop racing with concurrent agents
description: Due to race conditions in rabbit-file/branch_ops.py when multiple agents concurrently file items, my retry loop while filing the render-template.sh stale-doc bug caused CONTRACT-BUG-12, 13, 14, 15 to ALL be filed with identical content. Three of these four (12, 13, 14 or 15) should be closed as duplicates. Underlying issue: file-item.py reports failure on push race but the commit may have succeeded on a previous attempt, leaving retries to file duplicates. (Also reflects a rabbit-file robustness gap.)

history.note: Wave 4 triage: meta-bug about race condition that filed BUG-12/13/14/15; fixed by PR #112 (worktree race resolved)
